name: B2Gold Corp.
description: B2Gold Corp. is a low-cost international senior gold producer headquartered in Vancouver, Canada. Founded in 2007, the company has grown through strategic acquisitions and exploration into a diversified global mining entity. It currently operates gold mines in Mali, Namibia, and the Philippines, while also advancing numerous exploration and development projects in countries such as Canada, Colombia, and Finland. B2Gold is committed to responsible mining practices, focusing on environmental stewardship and social responsibility in the regions where it operates, while maintaining a strong financial position and delivering shareholder value.
